title: GTA VI + GPT-6: Rockstar's AI Mechanics Revealed
summary: A YouTube video from AI Master claims that GTA VI does not use GPT-6 and instead relies on Rockstar's proprietary AI stack based on RAGE 9 engine with custom patents for witness systems and NPC memory. The creator argues that viral "GTA VI + GPT-6" clips are fabricated and discusses the actual AI technologies Rockstar has deployed for real-time behavioral simulation in gaming.
writeup: The video debunks viral "GTA VI + GPT-6" clips, arguing they are fabricated and that Rockstar does not use GPT-6. It lays out Rockstar's proprietary AI stack instead: the RAGE 9 engine with custom patents covering witness systems and NPC memory for real-time behavioral simulation. The takeaway is a separation between marketing-style hype and the actual technologies behind persistent NPC memory and world simulation in the game.
